description: Wave 20 vision landed Guzma & Hala TAG TEAM (CSE-193); the right-hand robed white-bearded figure is Hala, Melemele Island Kahuna and founding Fighting-type member of the Alola Pokemon League Elite Four. This is the corpus's first Hala depiction and arrives via a dual-character TAG TEAM print rather than a solo Supporter. Pointered the card into the existing alola-elite-four node's appears_on list, extended the Cards-in-corpus section with the Hala-via-TAG-TEAM aspect (including the Kahuna-and-failed-trial-attempter narrative subject implicit in pairing Hala with Guzma), reworded the Hala-not-yet-in-corpus caveat into Hala-in-corpus-via-TAG-TEAM, and updated the Plumeria-NOT-an-E4-member caveat into a Plumeria-and-Guzma-are-Team-Skull caveat that flags the dual-character pointer pattern. Discrete Lair caveat updated: 3/4 enriched coverage now, but the TAG TEAM print's dual-character framing complicates a pure-E4 bundle thesis vs an Alola-NPC-senior-cohort framing.
citations: [Bulbapedia: Hala — Melemele Island Kahuna, Alola Elite Four Fighting-type]
[PokemonTCG.io: sm12-193 — Guzma & Hala TAG TEAM, Cosmic Eclipse]
